summary: Chile's posture is set in its National Quantum Technologies Strategy, issued by the Ministry of Science, which directs the state to promote research in post-quantum cryptography and to develop quantum-safe communications for critical infrastructure. An Expert Commission on Quantum Technologies, reporting through the national cybersecurity coordination, recommended the immediate implementation of quantum-safe communications technologies and further research in post-quantum cryptography.
govActors:
Ministry of Science (MinCiencia) | Issues the National Quantum Technologies Strategy directing post-quantum cryptography research
ANCI / National Cybersecurity Coordination | Convened the Expert Commission on Quantum Technologies and published its recommendations
provenance: Strategy + PQC research directive: MinCiencia National Quantum Technologies Strategy (ingested T1)
Quantum-safe recommendation: ANCI Expert Commission report, 1 October 2024 (ingested T1)
dominantProcess omitted: documents promote PQC/QKD research but name no standards camp (NIST/ISO/ETSI) - grey beats wrong
No standardFamilies, algorithms, hybrid stance, timeline or target stated in either document
